ops.note: FocusProgressView renders stepStatus-nil steps (context runs AND input-only steps) as 4pt borderStrong ticks vs 9pt decision dots — sim-verified light+dark on iPhone 17 Pro/iOS 26.5 (screenshots /tmp/tick-focus-light-dark.jpg: ticks read muted and non-fillable, current-step accent ring legible even on a tick; undecided dots hollow amber). Keyed strictly off stepStatus == nil, never step kind. Landed 771aaeeb.
